title: SBF Bought Robinhood Stock With Money Borrowed From Alameda Research
text: The question of ownership of FTX's shares of Robinhood stock has become more complicated.

title: Crypto Winter: Why Investors Are Leaving This Popular Stock Out In the Cold
text: Robinhood made an abrupt pivot to focus on cryptocurrency broking, but it's not paying off.

title: Twitter's New Feature Shows BTC Price, Links to Robinhood
text: Twitter users can now directly check the price charts of Bitcoin and Ether, as well as major stocks and ETFs, by simply typing the assets' names or tickers into the search bar.

title: Robinhood, Market Makers Vow to Fight SEC Trading Reforms
text: A new SEC proposal that would tighten regulations on stock trading execution has Robinhood and stock wholesalers up in arms.

title: Robinhood Offers An IRA With A 1% Match
text: Robinhood's new IRA matching program won't make you rich, but it is innovative. And for anyone working part-time, or just gigging, it could inspire a whole new cohort of savers.

title: FTX collapse isn't just Coinbase's problem — it's also Robinhood's
text: Robinhood Markets Inc.'s turnaround efforts are likely to grate up against the implosion of crypto exchange FTX and the broader cryptocurrency market, an analyst said late Monday, shortly before the U.S. charged FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried with multiple counts of fraud.

title: Mizuho's Dan Dolev is ‘super excited' about this fintech stock
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ: HOOD) has been a nightmare for its investors this year but a Mizuho analyst is convinced that it'll be a different story for those that choose to own it down here.

title: Robinhood's IRA Match Offer: Read the Fine Print
text: Free money is great, but it comes with a catch.

title: Interactive Brokers Stock Rides Fed Rate Hikes To Buy Point
text: Interactive Brokers has formed a long base as interest rate hikes boost the firm's revenue. IBKR shares angled lower Wednesday.

title: Robinhood says November monthly active users were flat relative to October
text: Robinhood Markets Inc. HOOD, -2.90% said Wednesday morning that it had 12.5 million monthly active users at the end of November, flat with what it had at the end of October. The trading company had 23.0 million net cumulative funded accounts as of the end of November, up about 40,000 from its October total.

title: Robinhood delivering IRA match
text: Robinhood announced on Tuesday it is offering individual retirement accounts (IRAs) with a 1% match on contributions.

title: Can Robinhood's New Retirement Accounts Save HOOD Stock?
text: Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ: HOOD ) is in the news today as the company is introducing a new service. It revealed in a blog post that it plans to make Robinhood retirement accounts available.

title: Robinhood, Trading App For The Young, Pushes Into Retirement Accounts With This Incentive
text: The Robinhood trading app will offer IRAs for gig workers and others lacking access to workplace retirement plans, offering a 1% match. The post Robinhood, Trading App For The Young, Pushes Into Retirement Accounts With This Incentive appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Robinhood launches IRA for gig economy
text: Brokerage platform Robinhood said Tuesday it launched an individual retirement account with a 1% match on every dollar contributed, targeting gig workers, people with side hustles and those building their own companies.

title: Robinhood banks on retirement to slow user attrition
text: Retail trading app Robinhood is entering the retirement game. The Menlo Park, California-based company today launched a waitlist for its new offering, Robinhood Retirement, which it describes as the “first and only” individual retirement account (IRA) with a 1% match on every eligible dollar contributed.

title: The 3 Most Popular Robinhood ETFs -- and Why Warren Buffett Loves 2 of Them
text: Both the Oracle of Omaha and Robinhood's retail investors think highly of two ETFs in particular.
